No candidate list was provided. For an insurer, direct service/underwriting costs are most analogous to COGS. 'Insurance Service Expenses' appears to be the current-period direct insurance cost line, while 'Claims Incurred' appears to serve that role in older presentation. Manual review recommended because insurer statements do not present a standard industrial COGS line.
